CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Shannon R. Clawson of Reed Smith LLP (415-659-4921) CourtCall appearing for defendant Impac Funding Corp. moving party. No other appearance.

Defendant's counsel notified court the notice of settlement was filed on May 20, 2013. The court vacated its tentative ruling, DEFENDANT IMPAC SECURED ASSETS CORP. MORTAGE PASS-THROUGH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To May-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT IMPAC SECURED ASSETS CORP. MORTAGE PASS-THROUGH'sEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to May 21, 2013 per stipulation of counsel. The matter is transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on that same date at 9:30 am. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
